description_long: This is a robust, industrial metal hanger with a large, rounded loop at the top and a smaller, circular ring at the bottom, connected by a central pivoting joint. The surface is dark gray with visible signs of wear and oxidation, giving it a weathered, utilitarian appearance. The main body consists of a thick, solid shackle with a pin running through the center, allowing the lower ring to rotate freely. The construction suggests it is designed to bear heavy loads, likely for use in lifting, securing, or suspending objects in urban or industrial environments. The metal has a slightly rough, matte finish, with some areas showing a subtle brownish patina from rust. The overall form is compact and functional, with no decorative elements, emphasizing strength and durability.
description: A heavy-duty, weathered metal hanger with a large loop, central pivot, and rotating lower ring, designed for industrial or urban use. The surface is dark gray with signs of rust and wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large upper loop, central pin, and the full circular lower ring clearly aligned.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the metal and the profile of the upper loop and lower ring, with the pivot joint visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the loop and ring alignment from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same profile and visible pivot joint.
